title.en: Ye Tian shuttled over, his eyes staring at this...

content.en:
Taia Sun Star.

Like a behemoth, it stands in the starry sky, radiating hundreds of millions of rays of light, illuminating this starry sky.

Unlike ordinary solar stars, this Tai'a solar star is hundreds of millions of times larger than ordinary solar stars, and the rules here are chaotic, and the flame temperature is extremely high.

Every ray of sun flame was enough to burn a cosmic god to death, and the flames in the depths of the sun were even more terrifying, and even the Earth Venerable did not dare to touch it.

Under normal circumstances, only strong people above the god general can enter this sun star.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled over, his eyes staring at this Tai'a Sun Star.

"This sun star is really extraordinary, and there is even a continent on it!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

Where there are continents in a normal sun, there may be star cores inside, but everywhere else is basically gaseous matter, and there are no continents at all.

But there are continents on this Sun Star, and the essence of these continents is actually a solid substance, but it is extremely strong, and it is connected to the Sun Star, which is difficult to take away, otherwise these continents are very good refining materials, and can even be used to refine the Chaos Treasure.

"Interesting, this Sun Star is very valuable, even comparable to a Dao weapon! If there is a True Ancestor, I'm afraid even the True Ancestor will fight for this Sun Star!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It's a pity that there is no True Ancestor in the current Great Universe, not even a True Monarch, even a powerhouse in the half-step True Spirit Realm, there is no way to take away this Tai'a Sun Star.

Therefore, a large number of Heavenly Monarchs entered this sun and star, just to collect the resources above.

Ye Tian flew into this Tai'a Sun Star and began to search for the Eternal Flame.

......

The Tai'a Sun Star is very large, even bigger than some big worlds, and coupled with the chaos of the rules here, the speed of the Heavenly Monarchs has been affected, and it has slowed down by tens of thousands of times.

Because of this, once the Heavenly Monarchs enter the Tai'a Sun Star, once they disperse, they may not be able to meet.

Ye Tian didn't meet anyone at first, and occasionally sensed the existence of other Heavenly Monarchs, and they all avoided each other, after all, it was unnecessary to fight each other without seeing treasures.

"Hey, Sunweed!"

Ye Tian saw a fiery red grass growing in flames.

This is a relatively common low-level innate origin thing, Sun Grass, which is not very valuable, and even belongs to the lowest grade among the low-level innate origins.

In the system of the Void Heaven One Vein, such a sun grass only has one point per plant.

For the god general level, such a sun grass is worth a lot, but it's a pity that it's better than nothing for Ye Tian.

"Take it, I'm too poor now, and a point is also a point!"

Ye Tian stepped forward and took away this sun grass.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to collect all kinds of fire-based treasures, and even some yang-based treasures that contained the power of the supreme yang.

The yang system is also a type of fire system, but it contains special effects, so it is called the yang system.

Some of the powerhouses who walked to the Yang Avenue liked the Yang Treasures, so the value of the Yang Treasures was generally very high.

In a month, Ye Tian has gained a lot, and the accumulated harvest is enough to have thousands of points!

1000 points a month, what kind of concept is this?

12,000 points a year!

120,000 points in 10 years!

100 years is 1.2 million points!

In the outside world, who can have such a harvest, and some top treasures do not have such a harvest!

Of course.

The actual situation can't be counted like this, in the later stage, the harvest will definitely become less and less, but Ye Tian only searched for a small area of area, and there was such a harvest, which showed how many treasures on this Tai'a Sun Star were.

"No wonder those Heavenly Monarchs are crazy, they came one by one, and they didn't even reveal the news, just because there are too many treasures here, and everyone wants to occupy them!"

Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

Ye Tian saw a corpse, it was the corpse of a Heavenly Monarch, not a Heavenly Monarch, but a very ordinary Heavenly Monarch, and he was also a local resident.

"Angels!"

Ye Tian saw a pair of wings behind this Heavenly Monarch, and the aura of the other party was exactly the same as that of the Angel Clan.

Obviously, this is a Heavenly Monarch of the Angel Clan.

The Angel Clan was also one of the great clans of the universe at the beginning, and then it declined, but in today's great universe, there are countless resources, and the Angel Clan has slowly developed.

Although the Angel Clan is far inferior to the Human Race, it has also given birth to many powerful Earth Lords, and even some Divine Generals, and even a few Heavenly Monarchs.

Unexpectedly, now the Angel Clan has fallen a Heavenly Monarch.

"The Angel Clan probably also wants to harvest some treasures here, once the treasures are harvested back, the Angel Clan can develop rapidly, but it's a pity that their strength is too poor!" Ye Tian sighed.

The gods and generals are cannon fodder when they enter the Tai'a Sun Star, and the Heavenly Monarch of the Angel Clan is too weak, and the foundation is too poor, and even some seven- or eight-star gods can't beat them, and they are also cannon fodder.

If you're lucky, you might be able to harvest some treasures, and if you're unlucky, you'll be killed.

Another month passed, and Ye Tian found a high-level innate origin thing, and it was a relatively high-value kind of high-grade innate origin thing-Zhiyang Xingchen Flower!

The Extreme Yang Star Flower is a high-level fire innate origin thing, containing the power of the Yang Dynasty, also known as the Yang innate origin thing.

Such an Innate Origin Flower is worth at least 100,000 points!

For a Heavenly Monarch, the treasure of 100,000 points is worth fighting for.

At the same time, there was also a Heavenly Monarch who discovered the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower, a Heavenly Monarch of the Yang Heavenly Palace, and he happened to be on the Zhiyang Avenue.

"Zhiyang Xingchen Flower is my !!"

The Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch of the Yang Heaven Hall was crazy, and grabbed towards the Yang Xingchen Flower at the fastest speed.

However, his speed was too slow compared to Ye Tian.

Swish!

Ye Tian used the space-time shifting technique, and instantly came to the side of the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower, grabbed it, and put it into his own internal universe.

"Wanfa Daozi, it's you!"

When Yang Long Tianjun saw Ye Tian, he showed a look of jealousy, but soon showed a look of madness again.

"Wanfa Daozi, the Extreme Yang Xingchen Flower is the first thing I saw, give it to me!" Yang Long Tianjun shouted.

"This is what I got first, just because you also want to snatch my Solstice Star Flower?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"Wanfa Daozi, I know that you are the 102nd Heavenly Monarch on the Heavenly Monarch List, and I am only the 199th Heavenly Monarch on the Heavenly Monarch List, and I am indeed inferior to you in terms of strength. But this is the Sun Star, my strength will be increased, and your strength will be suppressed. In the Tai'a Sun Star, you are no match for me. Yang Long Tianjun threatened.

He didn't know Ye Tian's life-saving methods, and there were not many people who really knew that Ye Tian's life-saving ability was strong.

The Heavenly Fire Sect knew, the Dark God would know, some Heavenly Monarchs of the Void Heaven Temple knew, and as for the others, they didn't know much.

And Yanglong Tianjun doesn't know!

Otherwise, he would never dare to threaten Ye Tian.
